findings.details: Unity MCP reported Build Settings with only Assets/Scenes/SampleScene.unity enabled at build index 0.
Unity MCP reported active SampleScene roots as Main Camera and Global Light 2D only.
StageRoot, Systems, RoomView, InteractableLayer, MonsterLayer, AudioRoot, UICanvas, EventSystem, and DebugRoot are not present in the active scene.
No project-owned Assets/Prefabs folder/assets were found by static file inspection; Unity MCP prefab search returned package prefabs only.
Unity MCP read_console timed out during this validation pass.

blocked_reason: Playable build work cannot proceed until a Stage 1 scene or boot path exists, required scene roots are present, and Build Settings are updated away from SampleScene-only.

recommended_next_unit.scope: Create Assets/Scenes/Stage1.unity with required root objects and register it for the next Unity validation pass.
